settlement_context: Transfer of full powers from Philibert Tsiranana to General Gabriel Ramanantsoa; 1972 referendum and Loi constitutionnelle provisoire; Revised Franco-Malagasy cooperation accords; Tsiranana handed full powers to General Ramanantsoa to form a government and resolve the 1972 crisis.
